intent: 完成 Fabric multi-store 的 scope 语义层接线 + co-location 旧模型退役整簇
goal: 让 个人/项目/团队 三层 scope 真正生效(写入落 scope + recall 按 project 过滤 + 双轴排序),并把 ~/.fabric/stores 变成唯一 source of truth(doctor 与十几个内部工具全改读 store、agents.meta 退役、install 不再建空柜子)。零用户 clean-slate 直接迁移,不做兼容映射。

in_scope: packages/cli store project registry / install / doctor-checks
存量知识 frontmatter clean-slate 迁移(项目内 + 各 store)
out_of_scope: org / 联邦多 repo 层级(只做 个人/项目/团队 三档)
个人库内部 per-project 细分
hook 注入的 scope 可视化标签(锦上添花,延后)
兼容映射/自动 backfill(走 clean-slate)
constraints: 改 shared schema 必须 pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared build 重建 dist
收口前本地跑 pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit
每 wave 收口即 git commit + sha 回填 git_commits[]
deferred 项不搁置:用 TDD 或行为保持验证
personal scope 条目绝不写入 shared store(R5#3 隐私红线)

task_decomposition.subject: store 内 project 实体/registry(可列举/创建/binding 时指定)
task_decomposition.done_when: fabric store 有 project list/create 能力;bindRemoteStoreToProject 可指定 project:<id> 写进 config;指定不存在的 project 被拦

verification.verifier: 新增 store-project test + cli-surface snapshot
verification.evidence: store-project-registry.test.ts 9/9 绿(create/list/dup-reject/invalid-id/bind --project 校验+active_project 落 config+不存在 project 被拦);cli-surface+install-cli-surface 16/16 绿;cli tsc --noEmit clean。schema: storeProjectSchema+projects.json(STORE_LAYOUT.projectsFile)+active_project on fabric-config;core: readStoreProjects/addStoreProject/storeHasProject;cli: storeProjectList/Create/resolveStoreDir+storeBind project 校验+citty store project list/create+bind --project

task_decomposition.subject: 写入落 semantic_scope + visibility_store(三态 个人/项目/团队 抉择 + AI 自归档判定 + 默认值)
task_decomposition.done_when: extract-knowledge.ts 与 review.ts approve 写出的 frontmatter 含 semantic_scope + visibility_store;personal 默认 personal store,team/project 默认 active_write_store;写 personal scope 进 shared store 被 isPersonalScope lint 拒

verification.verifier: extract/review 写入 test 断言 scope 字段 + 泄露拒绝 test
verification.evidence: write-scope-meta.test.ts 4/4(team→semantic_scope:team+visibility_store:write-store;active_project→project:<id>;personal→落 personal store;isPersonalLeakIntoSharedStore lint 4 组合);approve-promote-store.test.ts +1 断言 approve 后 canonical 仍含 semantic_scope+visibility_store(rewriteFrontmatterForPromote verbatim 保留);新增 resolveWriteScopeMeta(cross-store-write.ts)+ PersonalScopeLeakError;server tsc clean

task_decomposition.subject: recall 接入 semantic_scope + project 粒度过滤
task_decomposition.done_when: cross-store-recall 读 semantic_scope;walkReadSetStores 后按当前 project 过滤,只保留 当前 project:<id> + 非 project 坐标(team/personal),挡掉别 project 专属;无 project binding 时不过滤(全 team/personal)

verification.verifier: 多 project store fixture recall test:当前项目召回不含别 project 条目

task_decomposition.subject: resolveCandidates 双轴排序接进 plan-context
task_decomposition.done_when: plan-context 候选排序消费 resolveCandidates(scope 特异性 project>team>personal + store tie-break),不再纯 BM25;resolution.ts 不再零调用

verification.verifier: 排序 test:project:x 条目排在 team 之前(同相关性下)

task_decomposition.subject: 存量知识 clean-slate 迁移(补 semantic_scope+visibility_store,修脏 layer 如 KT-DEC-9003)
task_decomposition.done_when: 项目内 .fabric/knowledge + 各 store 知识 100% 带 semantic_scope+visibility_store;layer↔scope 一致(K[P]- 前缀与 personal scope 对齐);无 personal 条目躺在 team store

verification.verifier: 迁移脚本 dry-run diff + grep 校验:零缺字段/零脏 layer

task_decomposition.subject: doctor 改读 store(6 文件 ~30 处)替代项目旧 .fabric/knowledge + agents.meta
task_decomposition.done_when: doctor*.ts + cli/commands/doctor.ts + cli/store/doctor-checks.ts 所有点货/缺失/孤儿检查改读 read-set store;doctor 在仅 store 模式下不误报

verification.verifier: doctor test + grep doctor 文件无 agents.meta 直读

task_decomposition.subject: 十几个内部工具改读 store(含 AI 高频 recall 岗)
task_decomposition.done_when: loop-until-dry census:grep agents.meta.json 全部读者 → 逐个改读 store 解析;连续 2 轮无新隐藏读点

verification.verifier: grep agents.meta 读者清零(测试/迁移脚本除外)+ 回归测试全绿

task_decomposition.subject: agents.meta.json 旧空柜子退役
task_decomposition.done_when: agents.meta.json 生成与读取代码删除;项目 .fabric/knowledge body 不再是 source of truth

verification.verifier: grep 零生成/零读取 + 全测试通过

task_decomposition.subject: fabric install 不再给新项目建 co-location 空柜子
task_decomposition.done_when: install 流程不再创建 .fabric/knowledge/<type> 空目录 + agents.meta;只写 fabric-config + AGENTS.md 引导页 + store binding

verification.verifier: install-url-bind test 扩展:断言无空柜子产物

task_decomposition.subject: doctor lint:缺 scope / personal 泄露进 team store / dangling project ref
task_decomposition.done_when: doctor 新增三类 lint:知识缺 semantic_scope 报 warn;personal scope 在 shared store 报 error;project:<id> 指向 store 内不存在 project 报 warn

verification.verifier: 三类 lint 各一 test fixture 触发

task_decomposition.subject: 批量 re-scope + promotion(project→team 通用吸收)工具
task_decomposition.done_when: 提供命令把一批知识 re-scope(改 semantic_scope)+ promote(project:x→team,git mv/commit);维持 stable_id 与 cite 兼容

verification.verifier: re-scope/promote test:坐标更新 + 文件归位

task_decomposition.subject: 收口:全量 tsc + test 绿 + 删旧柜子验证 + rebuild dist
task_decomposition.done_when: pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared build + pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit + 全测试通过;dogfood:本 repo recall 命中迁移后的 scope-aware 结果

ship_criteria.name: G-PROJECT
ship_criteria.target: store project 可列举/建/绑,绑不存在被拦

ship_criteria.name: G-WRITE-SCOPE
ship_criteria.target: 新写入 frontmatter 含 semantic_scope+visibility_store,personal 不入 shared

ship_criteria.name: G-FILTER
ship_criteria.target: recall 只召回 当前 project + 非 project 坐标,挡别 project

ship_criteria.name: G-MIGRATE
ship_criteria.target: 存量 100% 带 scope 字段 + 零脏 layer + 零 personal 混 team

ship_criteria.name: G-DECOLO
ship_criteria.target: agents.meta.json 零读者(测试/迁移除外)+ doctor/工具全读 store
ship_criteria.verifier_cmd: PROBE: grep agents.meta 读者 + 回归 test

ship_criteria.name: G-INSTALL
ship_criteria.target: install 不再建 co-location 空柜子
ship_criteria.verifier_cmd: PROBE: install test 断言无空柜子

ship_criteria.name: G-GUARD
ship_criteria.target: doctor 三类 scope lint 生效 + re-scope/promote 工具可用

ship_criteria.name: G-GREEN
ship_criteria.target: shared rebuild + tsc --noEmit 全绿 + 全测试通过
